dictionary.label: Scope 1 greenhouse gas emissions
dictionary.definition: Direct greenhouse gas emissions from owned or controlled sources.

dictionary.label: Scope 2 location-based emissions
dictionary.definition: Indirect location-based emissions from purchased electricity.

dictionary.label: Renewable electricity percentage
dictionary.definition: Percentage of purchased electricity sourced from renewables.

dictionary.label: Total water withdrawal
dictionary.definition: Total volume of water withdrawn during the reporting year.

dictionary.label: Waste recycled percentage
dictionary.definition: Percentage of total waste diverted to recycling or reuse.

dictionary.label: Women on the board
dictionary.definition: Percentage of board seats held by women.

dictionary.label: Employee turnover rate
dictionary.definition: Employee turnover rate for the reporting year.

dictionary.label: Lost-time injury rate
dictionary.definition: Lost-time injury rate per million hours worked.

dictionary.label: Supplier code of conduct coverage
dictionary.definition: Percentage of active suppliers covered by the supplier code of conduct.

dictionary.label: Anti-corruption training coverage
dictionary.definition: Percentage of employees completing anti-corruption training.

dictionary.label: No significant environmental fines
dictionary.definition: Whether no significant environmental fines were recorded in the reporting year.

dictionary.label: Board sustainability committee
dictionary.definition: Whether the board has a sustainability committee or equivalent governance body.
